sprint: Atmosphere Engine V1 (MLAS) — Real Foundation Mix Set
task: A direct follow-up: "put these settings for time being," a screenshot of the Audio Mixer tool's own live sliders dialed to Master 40%, Air 50%, Harmony 3%, Magic 0%, Forest 28%, Wind 7%, World Fade 2700ms, Mute Fade 300ms. Sets these exact values as the new shipped defaults in js/audioManager.js -- FOUNDATION_LAYERS (air.mp3:0.5, harmony.mp3:0.03, magic.mp3:0, forest.mp3:0.28, wind.mp3:0.07) and DEFAULT_VOLUME/DEFAULT_WORLD_FADE_MS (0.4/2700, DEFAULT_MUTE_FADE_MS unchanged at 300) -- replacing the earlier, never-actually-tuned placeholder mix now that a human has actually listened to all five layers together. tools/audio-mixer/'s own Reset to Defaults button and hardcoded starting slider values/labels were updated in lockstep, so Reset always restores whatever the current shipped default actually is. assets/audio/foundation/README.md updated to state this is now the real, current mix, not a guess, while staying open to further re-tuning the same way. Verified via Playwright: the main app boots AudioManager with exactly these new values; the Mixer's own sliders show these exact values on load; dragging a slider away and clicking Reset correctly lands back on them; zero console errors. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; confined to constant values in js/audioManager.js, tools/audio-mixer/js/audioMixer.js, tools/audio-mixer/index.html, and one README update.
